Journal.Title: Journal of strength and conditioning research

Article.ArticleTitle: The Effects of a Soccer-Specific and Traditional Proprioceptive Training Programs on Change of Direction, Passing Skills, and Balance in Young Soccer Players.

AffiliationInfo.Affiliation: Faculty of Sport and Physical Education, University of Niš, Serbia.
